summary: Frontend-only testing for 2 new features: (1) Recently Viewed Venues - horizontal scroll strip on VenueSearchPage and CityHubPage, (2) Mobile responsiveness audit. All tests PASS. Both features work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RecentlyViewedVenues component correctly reads from localStorage key 'bmv_recently_viewed'
Venue cards display all required info: name, city, area, rating, venue_type badge, price_per_plate
VenueDetailPage saves venue to localStorage on load (line ~217) with correct data structure
Scroll buttons work correctly using scrollBy with smooth behavior
Mobile gallery tabs are compact and fully visible at 375px viewport
All mobile pages render correctly at 375px viewport
seed_data_creation: Test venues added to localStorage for scroll button testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recently Viewed uses localStorage key 'bmv_recently_viewed'. VenueDetailPage saves venue data on load. RecentlyViewedVenues component has data-testid='recently-viewed-section' and venue cards have data-testid='recent-venue-{venue_id}'. Scroll buttons have data-testid='recent-scroll-left' and 'recent-scroll-right'.

recently_viewed_search_page.TEST 1 - Visit venue detail and check lo: PASS - venue_658884a4e9c1 (Taj Palace New Delhi) saved to localStorage with correct fields
recently_viewed_search_page.TEST 3 - Venue card shows correct info: PASS - Name, city, area, rating (4.8), venue_type badge (hotel), price displayed
recently_viewed_search_page.TEST 4 - Scroll buttons visible and func: PASS - Left/right scroll buttons work, scrollBy with smooth behavior

recently_viewed_multiple_venues.TEST 7 - Multiple venues in strip: PASS - 4 venue cards displayed in horizontal scroll strip

mobile_gallery.TEST 8 - Gallery tabs at 375px: PASS - Photos, Video, 360° tabs all visible and compact
mobile_gallery.TEST 9 - Fullscreen photo viewer on mobi: PASS - Prev/next buttons work, photo counter shows '2/2'

mobile_responsiveness.TEST 10 - Mobile venue detail page: PASS - Hero image, tabs, booking CTAs display correctly at 375px
mobile_responsiveness.TEST 11 - Mobile search page: PASS - Filter toggle accessible, venue cards render properly
mobile_responsiveness.TEST 12 - Mobile landing page: PASS - Hero, city selector, CTAs render correctly
mobile_responsiveness.TEST 13 - Mobile CityHub page: PASS - City cards and layout work at 375px

mobile_responsiveness.search_page: Filter toggle accessible, cards render properly
mobile_responsiveness.landing_page: Hero, city selector, CTAs render correctly
mobile_responsiveness.cityhub: City cards and layout work properly
